articles.title: Protesters at Jantar Mantar find relief at free clinics set up by doctors
articles.description: The clinic, apart from having paracetamol, painkillers, bottles of Dettol, and sanitary pads, also has a machine to check blood pressure, an oximeter, and thermometers. The medicines and the equipment were donated by the people and the 10-12 doctors working there
